zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stawell於1476年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同時，他的父親Edward Stowell34歲，母親Agnes Cheney32歲。他和Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1508年9月5日享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Stawell于1476年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同时，他的父亲Edward Stowell34岁，母亲Agnes Cheney32岁。他和Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1508年9月5日享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stawell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stowell
meanings: English: habitational name from Stowell (Somerset), Stowell (Gloucestershire), East and West Stowell in Wilcot (Wiltshire), or Stawell (Somerset), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The surname was taken to the Isle of Man by 1511, from whence it migrated to Lancashire and Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stawell was born in 1476, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edward Stowell, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Cheney, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell. He died on 5 September 1508, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Stawell est né en 1476, à Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Stowell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Cheney, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1508, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Stawell 1476 in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Stowell 34 und seine Mutter Agnes Cheney 32. Er hatte mit Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1508 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stawell è nato il nel 1476 nel Cothelstone, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edward Stowell, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Cheney, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell. Morì il 5 settembre 1508, all'età di 32 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stawell(이)가 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Stowell(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Cheney(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Lady Anne Seymour St Maur Saint More Stowell(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 9월 5일 32세의 나이로 사망했다.
